title: Standardize Date Format on Reports and Dashboards Page to Match Salesforce
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want date columns on the Reports and Dashboards page to use the same format as Salesforce, so the display is clear and consistent.
description: Enhancement to standardize the date format across all date columns (Created Date, Last Modified, Last Viewed) to match Salesforce's display format for consistency and readability.
acceptance_criteria: All date columns use the same format as Salesforce
ux_changes: Updated date format in all date columns to match Salesforce standard format.
implementation_notes: Updated moment.js format strings to match Salesforce date display conventions.
comment_summary: Waqar updated the format and requested review. Screenshot shows the updated format.
